item.title: Michael Bublé's Movie Is Ridiculous
item.description: A lighthearted critique of Michael Bublé’s romance film and why it leans more awkward than charming for modern audiences.

media:content.media:title: Michael Bublé's Movie Is Ridiculous
media:content.media:description: A lighthearted critique of Michael Bublé’s romance film and why it leans more awkward than charming for modern audiences.

item.title: If Beauty Influencers Existed in the 1700s
item.description: This video imagines what beauty influencers would look like in the 1700s powdered wigs, dramatic blush, over-the-top tutorials, and all the historical glam you didn’t know you needed. A hilarious blend of modern beauty culture and vintage style.

media:content.media:title: If Beauty Influencers Existed in the 1700s
media:content.media:description: This video imagines what beauty influencers would look like in the 1700s powdered wigs, dramatic blush, over-the-top tutorials, and all the historical glam you didn’t know you needed. A hilarious blend of modern beauty culture and vintage style.

item.title: Miley and Liam's Heinous Movie
item.description: A humorous review of the film starring Miley Cyrus and Liam Hemsworth that turned out more tragic than romantic.

media:content.media:title: Miley and Liam's Heinous Movie
media:content.media:description: A humorous review of the film starring Miley Cyrus and Liam Hemsworth that turned out more tragic than romantic.
